# YYYY Yearly Review

> Define this year with one keyword or one sentence.

## Beginning-of-Year Plan vs. Reality

Compare the "direction / key plan for the new year" from last year's review with the actual result: completed, partially completed, or not completed, with main reasons.

## Highlights of the Year

Write your proudest achievements, important milestones, and unexpected gains.

## Biggest Takeaway

Write one core insight to carry into next year.

## Growth and Change

Write the key changes compared with the beginning of the year: thinking, capability, habits, and relationships.

## Regret and Letting Go

Write regrets and release: what did not happen, what you regret, and how you see it now.

## Gratitude

Write the people, events, or decisions you most want to thank this year.

## Area Review

Write the yearly status check for each area of attention.

- [[03-连接层/🌱 Area Name|Area Name]] - Yearly status note

## New Year Framework Proposal (Pending Confirmation)

Write a proposed new-year framework based on unfinished items and yearly reflection, then record user feedback.

## Direction for the New Year

**Keyword**: Write one word that defines next year's tone.

**Key Plans**: Write next year's key plans based on the version confirmed by the user.

**Things to Stop Doing**: Write habits, directions, or drains to let go of next year.
